subcodes.first_line: O 'Alí-Qabl-i-'Askar! Upon thee be the glory of God, the Lord of Power. Praise be to God that thou hast departed from thy visible homeland, seeking thy native abode [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا علی قبل عسکر علیک بهاء الله مالک القدر لله الحمد از وطن ظاهر قصد وطن
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @petitions to authorities, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @thankfulness; gratitude
